name: Chief of Staff - Action Items

Add 'AskElephant will do this' badge for automated actions

prototype_feedback_2026_02_20.user_quote: Anytime we actually present action items, they need to be a checkbox... I think not seeing where AskElephant is gonna do these action items for me is what's really missing.
